sentences.arabic: يَعْمَلُ سُلَيْمَانُ فِي صَيْدَلِيَّةٍ كَمُسَاعِدٍ لِلصَّيْدَلَانِيِّ.
sentences.translation: Sulejman radi u apoteci kao pomoćnik farmaceuta.
sentences.translationEn: Suleiman works in a pharmacy as a pharmacist's assistant.

sentences.arabic: يُرَتِّبُ الْأَدْوِيَةَ عَلَى الرُّفُوفِ كُلَّ صَبَاحٍ.
sentences.translation: Svako jutro slaže lijekove na police.
sentences.translationEn: He arranges the medicines on the shelves every morning.

sentences.arabic: يُسَاعِدُ الزَّبَائِنَ فِي إِيجَادِ الدَّوَاءِ الَّذِي يَحْتَاجُونَهُ.
sentences.translation: Pomaže kupcima da naðu lijek koji im treba.
sentences.translationEn: He helps customers find the medicine they need.

sentences.translation: Puno pita farmaceuta da bi naučio više.
sentences.translationEn: He asks the pharmacist a lot to learn more.
